title: taraxacum limnanthes
intro: Taraxacum limnanthes, also known as marsh marigold, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum limnanthes include its ability to support liver and kidney function, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers. Taraxacum limnanthes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
